title: Donut UI
description: A texture pack that changes the HUD to be donut-like.
body:
A texture pack that changes the HUD health bar into donut-shaped hearts with additional styles included for freezing, withering, absorption, poison, and riding a mount with health. Also includes hardcore mode donut health variants!

The pack also additionally changes the armor bars to a golden color and the attack indicator into a blue-handle sword.

![A showcase of the new donut-styled elements in the HUD.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46c7819258d0b78b8e32e1f37bb8544b1119a446.png)

Inspired by the [texture pack made by FailureArk](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/donuts). This project is meant to update the texture pack to Minecraft version 1.21.4 whilst adding a bit of touch ups. It may work for other versions, but that has not been tested.
